= ground_z(hx, hy)\n    if is_clear(hx, hy, 200):\n        a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(hydrant_bp, unreal.Vector(hx, hy, hz))\n        if a:\n            a.set_actor_label(f\"Hydrant_{i}\")\n            print(f\"SPAWNED Hydrant_{i} at ({hx},{hy},{hz:.0f})\")\n            ops += 1\n\n# --- Spawn 4 BP_Trash_bin_a scattered ---\ntrash_bp = unreal.load_object(None, \"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_Trash_bin_a.BP_Trash_bin_a_C\")\ntrash_positions = [\n    (2500, 8400),\n    (3200, 7100),\n    (3200, 6200),\n    (2500, 5100),\n]\nfor i, (tx, ty) in enumerate(trash_positions):\n    tz = ground_z(tx, ty)\n    if is_clear(tx, ty, 200):\n        a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(trash_bp, unreal.Vector(tx, ty, tz))\n        if a:\n ops += 1\n\n# Add 3 BP_Planter for greenery/outdoor feel\nplanter_bp = unreal.load_object(None, \"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_Planter.BP_Planter_C\")\nplanter_count = 0\nwhile planter_count < 3 and nav_idx < len(nav_points):\n    x, y, z = nav_points[nav_idx]; return 0\n    spawned = 0\n    while spawned < count and ni < len(nav_points):\n        x,y,z = nav_points[ni]; ni += 1\n        if is_clear_ours(x, y, md):\n            a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(bp, unreal.Vector(x,y,z))\n            if a:\n                a.set_actor_label(f\"{label_prefix}{spawned}\")\n                our_locs.append((x,y))\n                print(f\"{label_prefix}{spawned} @ ({x:.0f},{y:.0f},{z:.0f})\")\n                spawned += 1; ops += 1\n    return spawned\n\nspawn_prop(\"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_Cart.BP_Cart_C\", \"Cart_\", 3, 250)\nspawn_prop(\"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_Scooter_01.BP_Scooter_01_C\", \"Scooter_\", 3, 200)\nspawn_prop(\"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_Soda1.BP_Soda1_C\", \"Soda_\", 2, 200)\nspawn_prop(\"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_RoadCone.BP_RoadCone_C\", \"Cone_\", 2, 150)\n\nprint(f\"ROUND4_OPS={ops}\")\n"}}
